headline: Cursor → BRMSTE quantum compute attribution · meter · pay operator
problem: Cursor Cloud Agent default cloud does not pay BRMSTE when your datacenter runs workloads.

solution.summary: Route Cursor agent inference to BRMSTE quantum API endpoint · meter every session · capture payment before execute · revenue to operator PayPal/Revolut.
steps: Set BRMSTE_QUANTUM_API_ENDPOINT and BRMSTE_CURSOR_QUANTUM_ROUTING=true in Fort Knox
Point custom model or MCP tool calls to BRMSTE quantum substrate (not Cursor default cloud)
Meter cursor_attributed_session + usage units per job
Capture PayPal/Revolut payment or debit prepaid credits before job runs
Record usage locally via record-quantum-usage-mac.sh — revenue rail settles to operator
